{{Quote|I'm glad you did that. He was killing trade here. The droid company wouldn't give me a refund.|The Dabi bartender on Mirta Gev shooting Forre Musa|<ref name="B" />}}
The '''Dabi''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that had four [[Limb/Legends|arms]] that they could operate independently. A member of the species could speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]].<ref name="B" /> In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' to [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].</ref> a [[Unidentified Dabi bartender|Dabi]] worked as a [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] in [[Zerria's Bar]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Drall (planet)|Drall]]. When a visiting patron, the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mirta Gev]], destroyed the [[Vocabulator/Legends|speech circuit]] of the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Waiter/Legends|waiter]] [[Forre Musa]], the bartender applauded her action, claiming the droid had been ruining business at the [[Cantina/Legends|bar]].<ref name="B" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Dabi appeared in the [[2006]] novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'', which was written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="B" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st|[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}
*[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines (abridged audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines'' abridged audiobook]]
